requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and SS-EN 61000 Evidence for Sweden PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——瑞典光伏逆变器IEC 62920和SS-EN 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——瑞典光伏逆變器IEC 62920和SS-EN 61000證據

summary.en: Sweden PV inverter EMC expectations should be prepared on an EU/IEC basis because SIS is the national standards body adopting European standards as SS-EN, and project specifications for grid-connected PV commonly reference IEC-family inverter evidence under the EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. The practical EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable SS-EN 61000-series evidence for emissions, immunity, harmonics, surge, voltage dips, and power quality. For Svenska kraftnät / DSO grid-connected projects (overseen by Ei), harmonic and conducted-emission evidence should be tied to the actual inverter model, rating, and configuration. Sweden uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid; while the frequency matches China, the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V, so EMC and harmonic results obtained only under China conditions should be reviewed for applicability before submission.
summary.zh: 瑞典光伏逆变器EMC要求应按欧盟/IEC体系准备，因为SIS是国家标准机构，将欧洲标准采用为SS-EN，并网光伏项目规格通常依据EMC指令2014/30/EU引用IEC系列逆变器证据。实际EMC包应包括面向光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的SS-EN 61000系列发射、抗扰度、谐波、浪涌、电压暂降和电能质量证据。对于Svenska kraftnät / DSO并网项目（由Ei监督），谐波和传导发射证据应对应实际逆变器型号、功率等级和配置。瑞典电网为230/400 V、50 Hz；频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V，因此仅在中国条件下取得的EMC和谐波结果，在提交前应审查其适用性。
summary.zht: 瑞典光伏逆變器EMC要求應按歐盟/IEC體系準備，因為SIS是國家標準機構，將歐洲標準採用為SS-EN，併網光伏項目規格通常依據EMC指令2014/30/EU引用IEC系列逆變器證據。實際EMC包應包括面向光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的SS-EN 61000系列發射、抗擾度、諧波、浪湧、電壓暫降和電能品質證據。對於Svenska kraftnät / DSO併網項目（由Ei監督），諧波和傳導發射證據應對應實際逆變器型號、功率等級和配置。瑞典電網為230/400 V、50 Hz；頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V，因此僅在中國條件下取得的EMC和諧波結果，在提交前應審查其適用性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
SS-EN 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test, immunity, harmonic, surge, voltage-dip, and power-quality standards (SIS adoption) as applicable to the inverter configuration
EMC Directive 2014/30/EU and SIS standards adoption requirements where applicable
Svenska kraftnät / DSO grid-connection review requirements for power quality and harmonic performance (overseen by Ei)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic EMC test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports can be useful engineering background but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or the SS-EN 61000-series evidence requested by a Sweden project owner, SIS SS-EN conformity route, Ei oversight, or Svenska kraftnät / DSO grid-connection process. China test conditions are normally aligned with the China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, while Sweden uses 230/400 V at the same frequency.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021及来自CNAS认可实验室的相关国内EMC测试报告。这些报告可作为工程背景，但不能自动等同于瑞典项目业主、SIS SS-EN合格评定路径、Ei监督或Svenska kraftnät / DSO并网流程要求的IEC 62920或SS-EN 61000系列证据。中国测试条件通常对应中国220/380 V、50 Hz基准，而瑞典在相同频率下使用230/400 V。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021及來自CNAS認可實驗室的相關國內EMC測試報告。這些報告可作為工程背景，但不能自動等同於瑞典項目業主、SIS SS-EN合格評定路徑、Ei監督或Svenska kraftnät / DSO併網流程要求的IEC 62920或SS-EN 61000系列證據。中國測試條件通常對應中國220/380 V、50 Hz基準，而瑞典在相同頻率下使用230/400 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports under China standard scopes

gap.en: Gap: China-only EMC certificates under GB/T 37408 do not automatically satisfy Sweden EU/IEC-based project expectations under the EMC Directive. Exporters should obtain IEC 62920 and applicable SS-EN 61000-series reports for the specific model or family, confirm whether harmonics and conducted-emission results remain valid at 230/400 V, and provide surge, earthing, shielding, and enclosure documentation suitable for cold-climate Nordic installations. Where Svenska kraftnät, the DSO, or the project owner specifies harmonic limits or power-quality measurements, test reports should be mapped clause-by-clause to that requirement, and Swedish-language documentation may be expected.
gap.zh: 差距：仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不能自动满足瑞典依据EMC指令的欧盟/IEC体系项目要求。出口商应取得针对特定型号或系列的IEC 62920及适用SS-EN 61000系列报告，确认谐波和传导发射结果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，并提供适合北欧寒冷气候安装的浪涌、接地、屏蔽和外壳文件。若Svenska kraftnät、DSO或项目业主规定谐波限值或电能质量测量，应将测试报告逐条映射至该要求，并可能需要瑞典语文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不能自動滿足瑞典依據EMC指令的歐盟/IEC體系項目要求。出口商應取得針對特定型號或系列的IEC 62920及適用SS-EN 61000系列報告，確認諧波和傳導發射結果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，並提供適合北歐寒冷氣候安裝的浪湧、接地、屏蔽和外殼文件。若Svenska kraftnät、DSO或項目業主規定諧波限值或電能品質測量，應將測試報告逐條映射至該要求，並可能需要瑞典語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under the EMC Directive 2014/30/EU for CE marking; project-specific and effectively mandatory where Svenska kraftnät, the DSO (overseen by Ei), or project-owner documentation calls for IEC EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is a China domestic voluntary or certification-programme baseline and is not a Sweden EU/IEC evidence substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Sweden PV inverter EMC as an EU/IEC evidence package under the EMC Directive, not a China GB/T certificate transfer. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable SS-EN 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model, review harmonic and EMC applicability at Sweden's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid voltage, document cold-climate suitability, and confirm any Svenska kraftnät, Ei, DSO, or project-owner EMC requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 瑞典光伏逆变器EMC应按欧盟/IEC证据包处理（依据EMC指令），而不是直接转移中国GB/T证书。请为准确逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用SS-EN 61000系列报告，审查谐波和EMC结果在瑞典230/400 V、50 Hz电网电压下的适用性，记录寒冷气候适用性，并在出货前确认任何Svenska kraftnät、Ei、DSO或项目业主EMC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 瑞典光伏逆變器EMC應按歐盟/IEC證據包處理（依據EMC指令），而不是直接轉移中國GB/T證書。請為準確逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用SS-EN 61000系列報告，審查諧波和EMC結果在瑞典230/400 V、50 Hz電網電壓下的適用性，記錄寒冷氣候適用性，並在出貨前確認任何Svenska kraftnät、Ei、DSO或項目業主EMC要求。
